name: Lemon Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Olive oil or vegetable oil
10 ounces Red potatoes, cut into 1/4 inch slices
1/2 cup Canned ready-to-serve Reduced sodium chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 12-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Arrange potatoes in a single layer and cook until bottoms are browned, about 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Turn potatoes over and cook the other sides until browned, about 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Add broth, lemon juice, lemon peel, parsley, garlic, and pepper; stir to combine.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover skillet, and let cook until potatoes are tender for about 5 minutes.
6. Serve warm or chilled.
